scripts.dev: npm run cleanup && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.cleanup: powershell -Command "$conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000, 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { Stop-Process -Id $conns.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.prisma:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.lint: cd client && npm run lint && cd ../server && echo 'Linting server...'
